commitStatusNote: Fix is implemented and verified (real same-session red→green + unit + check + lint) and CONFIRMED by the live CI integration job (run 27878481800 success on HEAD 0a4a13aa). Done-certification content work completed 2026-06-24: the regression phase was genuinely re-run (TestIntentBypassGuardReportsRouterRouteWithoutCompiledIntent PASS, RC=0); simplify/stabilize/security are recorded as honest phaseStubs (genuine no-ops for a comment-only doc-provenance change); Check 8A is satisfied via the sanctioned docs-only Scope-Kind opt-out; G056 scopeProgress+lockdownState added. ALL content gates pass and the state-transition guard is GREEN at this in_progress state. Status is HELD at in_progress (NOT flipped to done) because the done transition triggers Gate G088 (post-certification planning-truth edit), which is structurally unsatisfiable while the certification's scopes.md edit is left uncommitted per the central-commit workflow (requiresRevalidation:true would trip G089; the only other G088 remediation is commit-then-restamp-certifiedAt). The orchestrator promotes to done by committing the planning truth and stamping certifiedAt AFTER that commit.

scopes.title: Add truthful spec-068 intent.Compiler provenance reference to the spec-095 downstream router

simplify.reason: No-op for a comment-only doc-provenance fix: the single change is a doc comment on selectRetrievalStrategy with zero runtime/control-flow/signature change. There is no new logic, dead code, or premature abstraction to simplify.

stabilize.reason: No-op for a comment-only doc-provenance fix: zero runtime behavior changed, so there is no flakiness, ordering, timing, or resource-stability surface to stabilize. Go unit suite + check + lint are green.

security.reason: No-op for a comment-only doc-provenance fix: the change adds documentation text only (no input handling, no auth/crypto/IO/serialization path, no new dependency). There is no security-relevant surface introduced or modified.

completedPhaseClaimDetails.evidence: Added a truthful intent.Compiler provenance reference to the selectRetrievalStrategy doc comment in internal/assistant/retrieval_strategy_routing.go. Comment-only; zero runtime/control-flow/signature change. Guard, AllowedRouteCallers, ScanSubdirs, guard test, and policy-exception-baseline.json all unchanged. See BUG-095-001/report.md Code Diff Evidence.

Real same-session red→green: go test -tags integration -run TestIntentBypassGuardReportsRouterRouteWithoutCompiledIntent ./tests/integration/policy/ was FAIL (expected zero findings under internal/assistant, got 1: retrieval_strategy_routing.go: missing intent.Compiler step before Router.Route, RC=1) before the comment and ok (0.143s, RC=0) after. Regression guard = the pre-existing intent_bypass_guard_test.go step-3 adversarial baseline (fixture WITH vs WITHOUT an intent.Compiler reference). See BUG-095-001/report.md Test Evidence + Adversarial Regression Guard.

./smackerel.sh test unit --go all packages green (UNIT_RC=0), including internal/assistant, internal/assistant/intent/policyguard, internal/retrieval/routing. ./smackerel.sh check clean (CHECK_RC=0; config in sync with SST; scenario-lint 17/0). ./smackerel.sh lint clean (LINT_RC=0; All checks passed; web validation passed). See BUG-095-001/report.md Validation Evidence.

Change Boundary via git diff --name-only: only internal/assistant/retrieval_strategy_routing.go changed; policyguard/guard.go, AllowedRouteCallers, ScanSubdirs, tests/integration/policy/intent_bypass_guard_test.go, policy-exception-baseline.json, and spec 095 top-level state.json all unchanged. No --skip/bypass used. See BUG-095-001/report.md Audit Evidence — Change Boundary.

Genuinely re-ran the bug's adversarial regression integration test on 2026-06-24: go test -tags integration -count=1 ./tests/integration/policy/ -run TestIntentBypassGuardReportsRouterRouteWithoutCompiledIntent -v → PASS (0.05s), RC=0. The test's step-3 WITH-vs-WITHOUT adversarial baseline proves the guard still catches a genuine raw-text bypass and is not tautological. See BUG-095-001/report.md Regression Phase Re-Run (2026-06-24).

resolution: The spec-068 raw-route bypass guard flagged retrieval_strategy_routing.go because it references the compiler OUTPUT type intent.CompiledIntent but never the literal intent.Compiler (Compiled vs Compiler). The file is genuinely downstream of the spec-068 compiler. Fix: add a truthful intent.Compiler provenance doc comment to selectRetrievalStrategy — documenting the real invariant and satisfying the guard the same way the sibling facade.go does. Makes the CI integration-job finding green; no guard/allowlist/policy edit, no runtime change.
